title: Advanced Algorithm Engineering Capstone · Algorithm Stakeholder Mission
summary: A technical review board needs a safe optimizer under uncertain scale. Ship exact, approximate, or randomized behavior with honest guarantees, budgets, and failure operations. Planned artifact: Deliver Bounded Planning Engine with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate capacities, conservation, source, sink, and residual choices from a stakeholder problem.
Trace forward and reverse residual capacity after augmentation.
Find augmenting paths and update flow without violating capacity or conservation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
